effect.farmersdelight.nourishment.descri: ni la, sijelo sina li pakala ala la sina wile ala e moku.
effect.farmersdelight.comfort.descriptio: ni la, mute moku ale la sijelo sina li kama pona.
ni la, pakala lon monsi li pakala suli.

tooltip.farmersdelight.hot_cocoa: li weka e pilin ike wan
advancements.farmersdelight.root.title: ante Farmer's Delight
advancements.farmersdelight.root.descrip: pilin moku mute li lon a!
o pali e ilo kipisi moku. kepeken ona la, jan li kama jo e ijo namako tan kasi, tan soweli.
advancements.farmersdelight.harvest_stra: o kipisi e kasi pan anu kasi telo kon anu kasi anpa kepeken ilo kipisi moku o kama jo e palisa pan
advancements.farmersdelight.place_organi: o pana e ma jaki. suno anu telo anu soko li lon poka la ona li kama ma moku kepeken tenpo lili
advancements.farmersdelight.get_rich_soi: tenpo la ma jaki li kama ma moku. ona li ma kasi pona a!
advancements.farmersdelight.get_ham.desc: o kama jo e moku pi noka soweli tan soweli moku anu soweli Hoglin kepeken ilo kipisi moku
advancements.farmersdelight.use_cutting_: sina jo e ilo pona lon luka la, o pakala e ijo kepeken supa kipisi
advancements.farmersdelight.obtain_nethe: seli li ike tawa sina la...
o pona e ilo kipisi moku sina kepeken mani Netherite a! (ni ala la, o weka tan tomo moku)
kasi moku sin tu tu li lon ma pi tomo ala, li lon ma mute.. li lon poki.
advancements.farmersdelight.plant_rice.d: o pana e sike mama pi kasi telo kon lon telo lili
advancements.farmersdelight.harvest_rope: o pana e linja suli lon sewi kasi linja kili. ni la, kasi li kama suli!
advancements.farmersdelight.hit_raider_w: o pana e kili jaki linja tawa jan ike a!
advancements.farmersdelight.get_mushroom: musi a! mun ko li soko
o kipisi e soko kulupu suli. sina kepeken ma moku pona la soko li ken kama ni..
advancements.farmersdelight.plant_all_cr: o mama e kili ma, e kili kasi, e soko, e noka kasi, e kasi moku ale!
advancements.farmersdelight.place_campfi: o pana e seli palisa. ona li ken seli e moku.
ma ale la sina ken seli moku kepeken ilo luka pi seli moku. o lon poka seli o luka e moku kepeken luka ante sina!
advancements.farmersdelight.place_skille: o leko e ilo luka sina pi seli moku kepeken nena Shift
advancements.farmersdelight.place_cookin: o pana e poki seli telo o kama pali e moku!
advancements.farmersdelight.eat_nourishi: sina moku e moku lon poki supa la sina wile ala moku lon tenpo mute!
moku mute li ken leko li ken pana tawa jan ante!
o moku e moku ale tan ante ni!
subtitles.farmersdelight.block.stove.cra: supa pi seli moku li kalama
subtitles.farmersdelight.block.skillet.s: ilo luka pi seli moku li kalama
subtitles.farmersdelight.block.skillet.a: ilo luka pi seli moku li kama jo

kili linja li weka tan kasi linja
subtitles.farmersdelight.entity.rotten_t: jan li pana e kili linja jaki
block.farmersdelight.feast.use_container: sina jo e %s la sina ken moku e ni.
block.farmersdelight.rice.invalid_placem: kasi ni li lon ala telo lili la ona li moli.

ilo ni la, sina ken ala kipisi e ni.
block.farmersdelight.skillet.invalid_ite: sina ken ala seli moku e ni.
item.farmersdelight.skillet.how_to_cook: o luka e moku kepeken luka ante sina!

death.attack.farmersdelight.stove.player: jan moku %2$s li seli moku e %1$s
jei.farmersdelight.decomposition.light: suno li lon la tenpo ante li kama lili
jei.farmersdelight.decomposition.fluid: telo li lon poka la tenpo ante li kama lili
jei.farmersdelight.decomposition.acceler: ijo ni li lon poka la tenpo ante li kama lili: (o lukin anpa)
jei.farmersdelight.info.straw: ni li ijo pali tan kasi. sina ken kama jo e ni tan kasi pan anu kasi telo kon anu kasi anpa kepeken ilo kipisi moku.
jei.farmersdelight.info.knife: ilo kipisi moku li ilo utala lili. sina ken kama jo e palisa kasi tan kasi pan anu kasi telo kon anu kasi anpa kepeken ona, e pana namako tan soweli.
jei.farmersdelight.info.ham: ni li kipisi suli tan noka pi soweli moku anu noka pi soweli Hoglin. sina kepeken ilo lili la sina ken kipisi li ken kama jo e ni.
jei.farmersdelight.info.wild_cabbages: tenpo mute la, kasi lipu pi tomo ala li lon poka telo.
jei.farmersdelight.info.wild_beetroots: tenpo mute la, kili ma loje pi tomo ala li lon poka telo.
jei.farmersdelight.info.wild_carrots: tenpo mute la, kili palisa pi tomo ala li lon ma pi seli meso, sama supa pi kasi lili anu ma kasi.
jei.farmersdelight.info.wild_onions: tenpo mute la, kili sike lipu pi tomo ala li lon ma pi seli meso, sama supa pi kasi lili anu ma kasi.
jei.farmersdelight.info.wild_potatoes: tenpo mute la, kili ma pi tomo ala li lon ma lete, sama nena suli anu ma pi kasi lete.
jei.farmersdelight.info.wild_tomatoes: tenpo mute la, kili linja pi tomo ala li lon ma pi telo lili, sama ma seli anu ma pi kasi seli.
jei.farmersdelight.info.wild_rice: tenpo mute la, kasi telo kon pi tomo ala li lon telo lon ma pi telo mute sama ma pi telo jaki anu ma pi kasi suli.
